summary.en-US: French daily word games — Le Mot, L'Hexagone, Connexions. Offline, no ads.

description.en-US:
Jeux du Jour is a collection of three French daily word games inspired by
the New York Times puzzle games. Every player gets the same puzzle on the
same day, generated deterministically from a date-based seed — no server
needed.

Le Mot (Wordle): Guess the 5-letter French word in 6 tries. Color-coded
feedback helps narrow down the answer.

L'Hexagone (Spelling Bee): Form as many words as possible using 7 letters
arranged in a hexagonal grid. Every word must include the center letter.
Climb from Débutant to Génie.

Connexions (Connections): Sort 16 words into four groups of four that share
a hidden connection. Four difficulty levels from yellow (easy) to purple
(tricky).

Dictionary powered by Lexique383 from lexique.org (109,000+ French words).
30 hand-curated Connexions puzzles included.

Free and open source. No ads. No tracking. No accounts. Works fully offline.
